title: LavidaCraft
description: Various tweaks and improvements to Minecraft
body:
LavidaCraft is a simple resource pack for Minecraft that improves and tweaks various parts of Minecraft while striving to preserve the Vanilla feel. It also features extensive configurability through the [Respackopts mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts). A Fresh Animations compatibility pack for LavidaCraft is available [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lavidacraft-+-fresh-animations-compatibility).

Preview images may not always reflect the current state of LavidaCraft

<details>
<summary>All Features</summary>

### Custom textures for the following blocks:
- Barrels
- Bedrock
- Brewing Stands
- Chiseled Stone Bricks
- Chorus Flowers + block model
- Copper Torches + block model
- Deepslate Redstone Ore
- Dirt Path
- Dragon Egg + emissive textures
- Dried Kelp Blocks
- Fletching Tables
- Glowstone
- Lily Pads
- Magma Blocks
- Podzol
- Potted Cacti + block model
- Rail Corners
- Redstone Ore
- Redstone Torches
- Soul Torches + block model
- Torches + block model

### Custom textures for the following items:
- Books
- Bottles
- Bows
- Coal
- Cookies
- Copper Nuggets
- Crossbows
- Diamond Chestplates (to fix missing pixels)
- Dragon Breath
- Enchanted Books
- Experience Bottles
- Fishing Rods
- Glowstone Dust
- Gold Nuggets
- Honey Bottles
- Iron Nuggets
- Leather Armor
- Lingering Potions
- Melon Seeds
- Netherite Armor
- Netherite Smithing Templates
- Netherite Tools + emissive textures
- Nether Quartz
- Nether Wart
- Potions
- Pumpkin Seeds
- Splash Potions
- Sugar
- Water Buckets
- Wheat Seeds
- Writable Books
- Written Books

### Custom textures for the following entities:
- Arrows
- Blazes
- Chickens
- End Crystals
- Endermen
- Guardian Beams
- Zombies

### Custom textures for the following miscellanious features:
- Destroy Animation
- Pumkin Blur
- The Sun
- The Moon
- Heart, Hunger, and Armor Icons
- The Hotbar
- The Experience Bar
- The Jump Bar
- Fishing Hooks
- Enchanment Glint
- Recipe Book
- Shield Icons

### Fixes/Other:
- Blurred End Flashes
- Seagrass clipping fixed

</details>

<details>
<summary>Permissions</summary>

LavidaCraft is only officially available on Modrinth and [ladflaver.github.io/lavidacraft](https://ladflaver.github.io/lavidacraft).

You may:
- Modify this pack for personal use
- Include this project in modpacks uploaded to Modrinth

You may not:
- Reupload or redistribute this pack or any assets from this page in ANY form

</details>


<details>
<summary>About Updates</summary>

I usually will only update LavidaCraft when I have new features ready. Feel free to ignore any warnings from newer versions of Minecraft about incompatibility as most if not all features should work anyways.

I usually only test pack updates on the latest version of Minecraft. Resource packs are almost always backwards and forwards compatible. If you experience any issues or if the pack doesn't work, please report it to me.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

 - Thanks to the project [Lush Creepers](https://modrinth.com/project/k0QHJ4Mg) for the inspiration for my creepers.
 - Thanks to TheRedHeadedKid2 for the inspiration for the nether wart texture.

</details>

If you have a feature request, feel free to create an issue on my issue tracker

Consider leaving a small tip on Venmo? @Lad_Flaver
